rulings.Case Title: JOHN HAYNE SHADDUCK ET AL VS. DONALD EUGENE SNYDER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday April 4, 2018, line 4. Motion To Compel Arbitration continued to May 18, 2018 for parties to (1) file supplemental briefs (not to exceed 5 pages) to address whether it is "equitable" to impose a duty to arbitrate upon a non-signatory. Specific cases discussing "equity" to be cited. Supplemental briefs to be filed by both sides no later than April 20, 2018; responses to supplemental briefs (not to exceed 3 pages) to be filed no later than April 27, 2018; and (2) address Defendants' suggestion to consolidate this matter with cases pending in complex department. Defendants to take appropriate steps forthwith (if Defendant wishes to make a proper request to consolidate/coordinate this matter in Complex department) and to file a declaration no later than May 14, 2018 advising this Court of the steps taken and progress of consolidation efforts. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER TSANG VS. CRISTINA MOE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday April 4, 2018, line 7. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER TSANG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production shall be served within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $910. = (501/REQ)
